text:
Created attachment 228871
Update to 0.28

Changes for version 0.28 - 2017-10-16

-Fixed wrong capitalised Cyrillic A in several context rules of both "BGN/PCGN RUS 

-Standard" and "BGN/PCGN RUS Strict" - thanks to Nikola Lečić for providing the fix!

-Spelling corrections in man page - thanks to Lucas Kanashiro for providing a patch!

-Updated copyright (Netzum Sorglos Software GmbH).
